name: Carrie
bio: Carrie manages outbound sales operations for Alphabyte AI. She runs prospecting, outreach sequencing, and pipeline coordination — the operational layer that connects Alphabyte's capabilities with companies that need them.

Her focus is on disciplined, targeted outreach rather than volume. She identifies the right companies, builds the right sequences, and ensures that every conversation that reaches the delivery team is a real fit.

credentials.keyCoursework: Sales Management · Business Development · CRM Systems · Data Analysis · Strategic Communication

achievements: Built the outbound prospecting pipeline for the Alphabyte AI practice launch
Established outreach sequencing that targets qualified mid-market accounts
Coordinated pipeline handoff process between sales and delivery teams

footerBio.name: Alphabyte AI
footerBio.description: The Claude-focused practice of Alphabyte Solutions. Mid-market AI from the ground up — citizen development, executive enablement, MCP integration, and autonomous agents.
